$comment: Shipped <sys/types.h> POSIX typedefs + the FIRST subdirectory descriptor (sys/types.json). off_t/ssize_t -> i64, mode_t -> u32; exit 42 witnesses the subdir resolution + typedef injection on all 4 ABIs. RED-on-disable: without the resolveSystemDescriptor subdir-preserving fix, <sys/types.h> maps to a non-existent types.json and the header fails to resolve -> compile fails. The release arm confirms the full shipped pipeline.
